title: Cosponsorship network on federal public-lands bills
source: GPO govinfo.gov BILLSTATUS (108th Congress+) and api.congress.gov (pre-108th). Nodes: legislators cosponsoring ≥2 bills; edges: pairs sharing ≥2 cosponsorships. See scripts/build_cosponsorship_network.py for the bill list.
